+	"name": "markdansi",
+	"version": "0.1.0",
+	"description": "Tiny dependency-light markdown to ANSI converter.",
+	"type": "module",
+	"main": "src/index.js",
+	"exports": {
+		".": {
+			"import": "./src/index.js"
+		},
+		"./cli": "./src/cli.js"
+	},
+	"bin": {
+		"markdansi": "./src/cli.js"
+	},
+	"scripts": {
+		"build": "pnpm lint && pnpm test",
+		"clean": "rm -rf dist",
+		"lint": "biome check .",
+		"test": "vitest run"
+	},
+	"keywords": [
+		"markdown",
+		"ansi",
+		"terminal",
+		"cli"
+	],
+	"engines": {
+		"node": ">=22"
+	},
+	"repository": {
+		"type": "git",
+		"url": "https://github.com/steipete/Markdansi.git"
+	},
+	"bugs": {
+		"url": "https://github.com/steipete/Markdansi/issues"
+	},
+	"homepage": "https://github.com/steipete/Markdansi#readme",
+	"author": "",
+	"license": "MIT",
+	"dependencies": {
+		"chalk": "^5.3.0",
+		"mdast-util-from-markdown": "^2.0.2",
+		"mdast-util-gfm": "^3.1.0",
+		"micromark": "^4.0.2",
+		"micromark-extension-gfm": "^3.0.0",
+		"micromark-util-combine-extensions": "^2.0.1",
+		"string-width": "^7.1.0",
+		"strip-ansi": "^7.1.0",
+		"supports-hyperlinks": "^3.2.0"
+	},
+	"devDependencies": {
+		"@biomejs/biome": "^2.3.5",
+		"vitest": "^4.0.0"
+	}
 }

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+	"compilerOptions": {
+		"strict": true,
+		"noUncheckedIndexedAccess": true,
+		"exactOptionalPropertyTypes": true,
+		"noPropertyAccessFromIndexSignature": true,
+		"allowJs": true,
+		"checkJs": true,
+		"module": "ESNext",
+		"moduleResolution": "NodeNext",
+		"target": "ES2022",
+		"resolveJsonModule": true
+	},
+	"include": ["src/**/*", "test/**/*", "docs/**/*"],
+	"exclude": ["node_modules", "dist"]
+}
